_comment: N-able CVE Dashboard — product configuration. Add rows to 'product_map' to match software N-able detects against your patch report. Keys are lowercased substrings matched against the patch report product name; values are the internal canonical name. Entries are matched top-to-bottom — put more-specific strings before less-specific ones. 'fixed_version_rules' maps canonical_name → {CVE-ID: minimum_fixed_version}.

fixed_version_rules._comment: Per-CVE minimum fixed versions + optional rolling baseline. Add '_baseline': 'version' to enforce a minimum version even without a specific CVE rule. Update baselines monthly as vendors release new versions.

remediation_rules._comment: Product-specific remediation steps. Keys match canonical product names from product_map.
firefox: Deploy Firefox update via RMM software deployment
Enable Firefox auto-update policy via Group Policy (DisableAppUpdate = 0)
AppData installs (%APPDATA%\Mozilla) bypass managed update — redeploy as SYSTEM install
chrome: Deploy Chrome update via RMM software deployment
Verify Google Update service is running: services.msc → gupdate/gupdatem
Enforce update policy via Group Policy: Computer Config → Google → Update → Auto-update
AppData installs (%LOCALAPPDATA%\Google\Chrome) bypass managed update — redeploy as SYSTEM
edge: Run: winget upgrade Microsoft.Edge or deploy via RMM
Check Microsoft Edge Update service status in services.msc
For AppData installs (%LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Edge) — redeploy as managed package
vlc: Deploy VLC update via RMM software deployment
VLC has no background updater — manual or RMM deployment required on each affected device
ssms: Download latest SSMS from Microsoft and deploy via RMM
SSMS does not auto-update — schedule quarterly manual update cycle

rmm_inventory_columns._comment: Expected column order when N-able Device Inventory has no header row. Update if N-able changes the export format.
